app.name: AriaType
general.title: General Settings
general.transcription.outputLanguageDesc: Language for speech recognition output (auto = detect automatically)
general.startup.title: Startup
general.startup.autoStartDesc: Automatically launch AriaType when you log in to your computer
general.startup.recordingSoundDesc: Play a soft tone when recording starts or stops
general.startup.stayInTrayDesc: Keep the app in the system tray even when the main window is closed. The app won't appear in the Dock when hidden.
general.audio.title: Audio Input
general.audio.description: Select the microphone to use for recording
general.audio.processingDesc: Configure noise reduction and silence trimming to optimize recognition speed and quality.
general.audio.vadDesc: Automatically trim silence at the start/end and collapse long pauses to speed up transcription. Turn off if you speak very quietly.
general.audio.screenContextDesc: Capture the focused window content via OCR at recording start. This context helps polish models better understand your intent.
general.pill.title: Pill Position
general.display.title: Appearance
general.display.description: Customize the look and feel of AriaType
general.display.pillSizeDesc: Adjust the size of the pill indicator
general.language.title: App Language
general.language.description: Choose the display language for AriaType
general.permissions.title: Permissions
general.permissions.description: System permissions required for AriaType to work
general.permissions.screenRecordingDesc: Optional for window context capture (improves polish accuracy)
general.privacy.title: Privacy
general.privacy.analyticsDesc: Join our improvement program to help us optimize the experience. Only crash reports and usage statistics are collected—no voice or text content is recorded.
cloud.title: Cloud Services
cloud.stt.title: Cloud STT
cloud.stt.description: Use cloud-based STT engines for transcription
model.stt.cloud.enableDesc: Use cloud API for transcription instead of local models.
cloud.polish.providerHint: Supports any subscription service compatible with OpenAI or Anthropic API format.
cloud.polish.title: Cloud Text Polish
cloud.polish.description: Use cloud LLM for text polishing
hotkey.title: Hotkey Settings
hotkey.conflictDictate: Hotkey already used by Dictate profile
hotkey.conflictRiff: Hotkey already used by Riff profile
hotkey.conflictCustom: Hotkey already used by Custom profile
hotkey.riffTemplateRequired: Riff profile requires a polish template
model.title: Model Settings
model.active.title: Active Model
model.active.description: Select which downloaded model to use
model.active.noModels: No models downloaded. Download a model below to get started.
model.domain.glossaryDesc: Comma-separated terms (no spaces). Your custom glossary for transcription.
model.available.title: Available Models
model.available.description: Download speech models for offline transcription
model.performanceSection.title: Performance
model.polishSection.title: Text Polish
model.performance.gpuDesc: Use GPU acceleration for faster transcription
model.performance.modelResidentDesc: Keep model loaded in memory for instant transcription (uses more RAM)
model.performance.idleUnloadDesc: Unload model from memory after idle time to save RAM
model.info.title: Active Model Info
model.polish.templateFillerDesc: Clean up transcribed text by removing filler words, redundant expressions, and speech disfluencies. Correct typos and grammar errors.
model.polish.templateFormalDesc: Convert to professional written style with proper grammar and formal language. Remove colloquialisms.
model.polish.templateConciseDesc: Shorten and simplify text while keeping all key information. Remove unnecessary words.
model.polish.templateAgentDesc: Format as structured markdown for AI agents. Remove filler words and clarify intent for better AI understanding.
model.polish.templatePromptPlaceholder: Enter the instructions for the polish model...
model.polish.templateDeleteConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to delete the template "{{name}}"?
model.polish.templateCustomDesc: Write your own custom prompt to define how the text should be processed.
model.polish.cloud.enableDesc: Use a cloud-based LLM for text polish instead of local models. Requires API key.
model.polish.cloud.enableThinkingDesc: Enable thinking mode for supported models (e.g., Qwen with Coding Plan). May increase response time.
about.platforms.title: Supported Platforms
about.featuresDesc: Private, local, and effortless voice typing.
polishTemplates.title: Polish Templates
polishTemplates.builtInDesc: Pre-configured templates for common use cases
polishTemplates.emptyHint: No custom templates yet. Create one to get started.
polish.unavailableHint: Enable Cloud Polish or download a local model first
about.feature.privacy.title: Privacy First
about.feature.voice.title: Voice Recognition
about.feature.voice.description: Powered by Whisper for accurate transcription
about.feature.hotkey.title: Global Hotkey
about.feature.hotkey.description: Press and hold to record, release to type
about.feature.insert.title: Smart Insert
about.feature.insert.description: Text appears instantly at your cursor position
about.feature.polish.title: Text Polish
about.feature.design.title: Minimal Design
about.feature.design.description: Clean interface that stays out of your way
permission.title: Accessibility Permission Required
permission.description: AriaType requires accessibility permission to use global shortcuts for recording control. Please grant permission in System Settings.
logs.title: Logs
onboarding.hotkey.hint: Click to change, or keep the default
onboarding.practice.instruction: Hold {{hotkey}} to record, release to stop.
onboarding.practice.tip: Hold the hotkey and speak, then release to see your transcription.
onboarding.done.feature1Highlight: your data stays local by default
onboarding.done.feature2Highlight: hold to speak, release to type
onboarding.permissions.title: Permissions
onboarding.permissions.description: Grant the necessary permissions to use AriaType
onboarding.model.title: Download Model
onboarding.model.description: Download a speech recognition model for offline transcription
onboarding.language.title: Select Language
onboarding.language.description: Choose your preferred language for speech recognition
onboarding.language.hint: This sets the language for transcription output. You can change this later in settings.
onboarding.hotkey.title: Set Hotkey
onboarding.practice.title: Try It Out
onboarding.practice.description: Test your setup with a quick recording
dashboard.activity.title: Summary
history.title: History
history.clearAllConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete all transcription history? This cannot be undone.
history.empty.title: No history yet
history.empty.description: Your transcription history will appear here as you use AriaType
